zh.lifeSummary: Asceline FitzAndre是Andre de Paynes和Mrs Andre de Paynes的女兒，於1052年出生在英國藍卡爾澤福頓。她於大約1073年與Paganus de Villiers在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1102年在英國藍卡爾沃林頓享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Asceline FitzAndre是Andre de Paynes和Mrs Andre de Paynes的女儿，于1052年出生在英国藍卡爾澤福頓。她于大约1073年与Paganus de Villiers在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1102年在英国藍卡爾沃林頓享年50岁。

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

en.lifeSummary: Asceline FitzAndre was born in 1052, in Sefton, Lancashire, England as the daughter of Andre de Paynes and Mrs Andre de Paynes. She married Paganus de Villiers about 1073, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1102, in Warrington, Lancashire, England, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Asceline FitzAndre est née en 1052, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre, fille de Andre de Paynes et Mrs Andre de Paynes. Elle a épousé Paganus de Villiers environ 1073, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1102, à Warrington, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Asceline FitzAndre wurde 1052 in Sefton, Lancashire, England, als Tochter von Andre de Paynes und Mrs Andre de Paynes geboren. Sie hat um 1073 in Lancashire, England Paganus de Villiers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1102 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Warrington, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Asceline FitzAndre è nata il nel 1052 nel Sefton, Lancashire, England come figlia di Andre de Paynes e Mrs Andre de Paynes. Lei sposato Paganus de Villiers circa 1073, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1102, nel Warrington, Lancashire, England, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Asceline FitzAndreは1052年にイギリスランカシュアイアセフトンでAndre de PaynesとMrs Andre de Paynesの娘として生まれた。約1073年にイギリスランカシュアイアでPaganus de Villiersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1102年にイギリスランカシュアイアワーリントンで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Asceline FitzAndre(은)는 1052년 영국 랭카실르 세프턴에서 Andre de Paynes(와)과 Mrs Andre de Paynes의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1073년 영국 랭카실르에서 Paganus de Villiers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1102년 영국 랭카실르 워링턴에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Sefton, Lancashire, England, United King: Sefton, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Asceline FitzAndre nasceu em 1052, em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra filha de Andre de Paynes e Mrs Andre de Paynes. Ela casou-se com Paganus de Villiers aproximadamente 1073, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1102, em Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Asceline FitzAndre родилась в 1052 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия. Её родителей звали Andre de Paynes и Mrs Andre de Paynes. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Paganus de Villiers около 1073 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1102 г. в местности варрингтон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Asceline FitzAndre nació en 1052, en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra como hija de Andre de Paynes y Mrs Andre de Paynes. Se casó con Paganus de Villiers aproximadamente 1073, en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1102, en Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años.
